description: Pod is repeatedly crashing and Kubernetes is restarting it in a loop.
causes: Application error; Wrong configuration; Port conflict; Dependency not available
debug: kubectl describe pod <pod-name>; kubectl logs <pod-name>; kubectl logs <pod-name> --previous
solution: Fix application error; Check environment variables; Verify container ports; Ensure dependencies are reachable

description: Kubernetes is unable to pull the container image from the registry.
causes: Incorrect image name; Authentication failure; Image not available
solution: Verify image name and tag; Check imagePullSecrets; Ensure image exists

description: Error occurred while pulling container image.
causes: Invalid image name; Network issue; Registry not accessible
solution: Fix image name; Check network connectivity; Validate registry access

description: Container is killed because it exceeded memory limits.
causes: Memory limit too low; Memory leak
debug: kubectl describe pod <pod-name>; kubectl top pod
solution: Increase memory limits; Optimize memory usage

description: Pod is not scheduled on any node.
causes: Insufficient resources; Node selector mismatch; Taints issue
solution: Add resources; Fix node selectors; Update tolerations

description: Node is not ready to accept pods.
causes: Kubelet stopped; Network issue; Resource exhaustion
debug: kubectl get nodes; kubectl describe node <node-name>
solution: Restart kubelet; Check network; Free resources

description: Service is not able to handle the request.
causes: Backend pods down; Service misconfiguration; Ingress issue
debug: kubectl get pods; kubectl get svc; kubectl describe ingress
solution: Restart pods; Fix service selectors; Verify ingress rules

description: Gateway received invalid response from backend.
debug: Check ingress logs; kubectl get pods

description: Pod is stuck while being created.
causes: Volume mount issues; Slow image pull; Network problems
solution: Check volumes; Verify network; Ensure image access

description: Application failed due to missing or incorrect ConfigMap.
causes: ConfigMap not found; Wrong key reference
debug: kubectl get configmap; kubectl describe pod <pod-name>
